headline: PE's New Era: Ops > Finance as Firms Chase EBITDA Growth & Digital-First Value Creation

stories.title: Healthcare PE Hits Record $191B Dealmaking Momentum on AI-Driven IT Value Plays
stories.summary: Healthcare PE crushed it in 2025 with record $191B deal value, driven by healthcare IT's explosive growth (doubled to $32B). PE firms are now treating AI as margin expansion, not a bolt-on.
stories.takeaway: Behavioral health & AI-enabled provider platforms getting aggressive capital flows as firms scale models without adding labor — this is the real value creation move.
stories.source: Bain Global Healthcare Private Equity Report 2026

stories.title: Tech M&A Consolidation Play: AI Infrastructure & Software Firms Dominate PE Investment Pipeline
stories.summary: AI deal activity is moving beyond software early-adopters into professional services, fintech, and industrial goods. Build-to-buy constructs & platform roll-ups are the new playbook for capturing fragmented markets.
stories.takeaway: PE firms are aggressively deploying buy-and-build strategies (40% of 2024 PE deal value), especially in software, with add-ons expanding geographic reach & product offerings fast.
stories.source: PitchBook 2026 US Private Equity Outlook & McKinsey Global Private Markets Report

stories.title: Consumer Field Services: PE's Buy-and-Build Playbook Drives Pricing Power & EBITDA Uplift
stories.summary: PE-backed multisite roll-ups are unlocking 25% EBITDA uplifts through surgical pricing actions and operational discipline. New funds like Point 41 Capital's $400M debut signal sustained confidence in field services consolidation.
stories.takeaway: Lowkey, the move here is bottom-up pricing power assessment + integration discipline. Firms that build scale + standardize ops across locations are outperforming.
stories.source: Cherry Bekaert PE Report 2025 Trends & 2026 Outlook

stories.title: Industrials PE: Energy Transition & Digital Infrastructure Capture Mega-Fund Dry Powder Flows
stories.summary: Industrials saw elevated valuation multiples & transaction diversity in 2025, with PE firms pursuing energy transition opportunities and digital infrastructure plays that support AI demand. NextEra's acquisition of Symmetry Energy marks strategic exit momentum.
stories.takeaway: Infrastructure & energy transition are the durable opportunity set for industrials. Firms embedding operational excellence are gaining the edge as buyouts move beyond financial engineering.
stories.source: Cherry Bekaert & PwC Industrial Sector Analysis 2026

watchNext.title: Bain Global PE Report 2026: '12 is the New 5' — Why EBITDA Growth Speed is Everything
watchNext.why: This report literally rewrites PE's playbook. Deals now demand faster EBITDA growth to offset multiple compression. Winners will build systems & invest in AI/talent, not slogans.

watchNext.title: BCG: Digital Transformation & AI as Core Value Drivers, Not Bolt-Ons
watchNext.why: Survey data shows 53% of LPs now rank GP value creation strategy in their top 5 manager selection criteria. Digital + AI is no longer nice-to-have — it's table stakes for returns.
